mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show negative mean or Rank IC < 0.02 over 12-month rolling windows when FEDFUNDS < 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated unemployment rates reflect deteriorating household income and consumer spending capacity, which suppresses corporate revenue growth and drives negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns remain positive in >55% of observations when UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, or rolling Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month acceleration in real sales indicates rapid consumer demand recovery, prompting immediate upward revisions to near-term earnings forecasts and generating positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in <40% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) when RSAFS growth exceeds 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 95.0 index threshold signals severe supply chain disruptions and manufacturing bottlenecks that constrain output growth and trigger negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of observations when INDPRO remains below 95.0, or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of near-zero policy rates and a declining unemployment rate creates a favorable macro environment where accommodative financing amplifies labor market recovery, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a statistically insignificant coefficient (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression, or forward returns are negative when both conditions hold simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts combined with suppressed policy rates signal expanding credit availability and household leverage, which fuels broader economic activity and generates positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns show no significant positive correlation with the HOUST-FEDFUNDS interaction term, or the signal reverses when HOUST growth exceeds 15% year-over-year.

mechanism_narrative: Stabilizing nonfarm payrolls alongside positive real sales growth confirms earnings resilience during economic normalization, producing positive forward returns over the next month when the economy transitions out of acute contraction.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive returns during the recovery phase, or Rank IC drops below 0.02 when GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth remains negative.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production coinciding with accelerating inflation signals emerging stagflationary pressures that force central banks to restrict liquidity, triggering negative short-term equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >50% of observations when INDPRO declines and CPIAUCSL rises simultaneously, or the mechanism loses predictive power when inflation expectations are anchored below 2.0%.
